overview: Anti-Aging Medical Group provides bioidentical hormone replacement therapy (BHRT) for men and women experiencing menopause, perimenopause, PMS, PMDD, and low testosterone. Dr. Selma Rashid, board-certified in Internal Medicine with two decades of BHRT experience, develops individualized treatment plans to restore hormone balance and prevent age-related health decline.
highlights: Telemedicine in California, Nevada, Colorado, and Illinois
Board-certified physician with 20+ years BHRT experience
targetAudience: Women experiencing menopause or PMS/PMDD, men with low testosterone, and individuals seeking hormone-based preventive aging care.
